name: ChkConfig_SetCallback
title: ChkConfig_SetCallback
description: Sets a CAPL callback for the check. An already existing callback will be overwritten.This function can be used if the check itself has no syntax to create/start and to assign a callback.

parameters.name: CaplCallback
parameters.description: The name of the CAPL callback function.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
